design_philosophy: A 'Boutique Medical' aesthetic blending the high-trust, calming nature of earth tones with cutting-edge tech via smooth Framer Motion animations and crisp 'Crystal Glass' overlays. Avoid sterile clinical blues; use warm bone-white, deep forest greens, and sage to evoke wellness and authority.

rules.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-display font-semibold tracking-tight text-foreground
rules.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-heading font-medium tracking-tight text-foreground
rules.large_numbers: text-6xl md:text-8xl font-display font-semibold tracking-tighter text-primary

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-12 in cards) to evoke high-end editorial design. Tension via asymmetry.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: The 'Control Room' Layout. Use CSS Grid: grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-6 md:p-10. Max width 1440px mx-auto.

surface_strategies.glass_panel: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/60 shadow-lg rounded-3xl
surface_strategies.inputs: bg-background border-border text-foreground focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary rounded-xl transition-all

components_instructions.buttons: rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-heading font-medium transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:translate-y-0
components_instructions.symptom_tags: rounded-full px-5 py-2 bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground border border-transparent hover:border-primary/30 transition-colors cursor-pointer text-sm font-medium inline-flex items-center gap-2
components_instructions.confidence_bar: h-2.5 w-full bg-muted rounded-full overflow-hidden. Animate the inner bar width using Framer Motion. Color code based on severity.
components_instructions.chat_bubble_user: p-4 rounded-2xl max-w-[85%] text-sm bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-br-sm ml-auto
components_instructions.chat_bubble_ai: p-4 rounded-2xl max-w-[85%] text-sm bg-surface border border-border text-foreground rounded-bl-sm mr-auto shadow-sm
components_instructions.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone or Regular weight). Do not use generic icons.

media_urls.description: Abstract 3D organic cellular shapes floating in warm soft lighting. Use with a gradient overlay (bg-background/80 to transparent) so text remains fully legible.
Macro photography of clear crystalline medical glass and soft warm sand textures. Use as the left-side cover image on the login/register screen.

motion_and_interactions.page_load: Use Framer Motion to stagger the entrance of the dashboard components (y: 20, opacity: 0 to 1, duration 0.5s, staggerChildren 0.1s).
motion_and_interactions.predictions_reveal: When a disease prediction is generated, animate the large percentage number counting up (if possible) or smoothly scaling in.
motion_and_interactions.ai_typing_indicator: Use a subtle 3-dot pulse animation inside the chat window when waiting for Claude to respond.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards should subtly lift (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow on hover.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility_testing: CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='symptom-input', data-testid='login-submit-button').

specific_page_instructions.landing_page: High visual impact hero section. Massive H1 typography. Use the hero_background image covering the full screen behind a bg-background/90 overlay. Clear CTA to 'Start Symptom Assessment'.
specific_page_instructions.dashboard: The core app. A clean top navigation bar with user profile. Left sidebar for Navigation/History. Center column for 'Symptom Input' (a large, inviting search bar that adds tags) and the 'Prediction Results' cards. Right column for the 'Claude AI Assistant' sticky chat interface.
specific_page_instructions.prediction_card: When results are returned, display them prominently. The top prediction should dominate the space with 'text-8xl font-display'. Show the Severity Indicator (Low/Medium/High) using the corresponding severity color. Below predictions, show a horizontal scrollable row of 'Mock Nearby Doctors' using the provided images.
specific_page_instructions.auth_page: Split screen layout (lg:grid-cols-2). Left side is the auth_side_image (object-cover). Right side is the centered Login/Register form, heavily padded (p-12), using clean 'Soft Utility' Shadcn customized inputs.
